questions.question: Describe the difference between initializing a two-dimensional array in row-major order and column-major order.
questions.hint: For example, how does the storage layout of the array differ?

questions.question: Write a code snippet to initialize a 2x2 two-dimensional array with a value of -1, and then print its values.
questions.hint: Use a programming language of your choice

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using a two-dimensional array in computer programming?
